     The Numbers Business Report

My Big Fat Greek Wedding 3 (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,496,030Details
International Box Office $10,365,643
Worldwide Box Office $38,861,673
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $452,714
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $493,998
Total $946,712
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Portokalos family is sent an invitation to participate in a reunion for all the families who have moved away from the village their father came from. It was sent to them by Victory, the extremely passionate town mayor. Before he passed away, Toula’s father, Gus, asked her to go to the reunion and meet his old friends to pass on a journal he had kept of his life story. To honor his memory, the Portokalos family wants to see where their dad grew up.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,028,675 (35.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.84 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:73.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,650 opening theaters/3,678 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,152,882

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 8th, 2023 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: September 7th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
September 7th, 2023 (Wide) (Bosnia and Herzegovina)
September 7th, 2023 (Wide) (Macedonia)
September 7th, 2023 (Wide) (Cyprus)
September 7th, 2023 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: September 26th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for suggestive material and some nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2789 (cert #54117), 6/28/2023)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Franchise: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Filming location (country): Greece, United States
Filming location (locale): Greystone Mansion, Beverly Hills, CA
Filming location (state or county): California, United States
Geographical setting: Greece
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Gold Circle Films, HBO Films, Playtone, Focus Features
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The Portokalos family is sent an invitation to participate in a reunion for all the families who have moved away from the village their father came from. It was sent to them by Victory, the extremely passionate town mayor. Before he passed away, Toula’s father, Gus, asked her to go to the reunion and meet his old friends to pass on a journal he had kept of his life story. To honor his memory, the Portokalos family wants to see where their dad grew up.
